note: Sprint 5.24 Trinity Operator Loop Governor Observe Hook v0.1: wires the standalone Autonomy Governor (Sprint 5.23) into scripts/trinity/useful_compute_operator_loop.py as an opt-in, audit-only hook that fires before each of the seven pipeline steps (task_builder, worker, replay_validator, governance_gate, reward_budget_policy, payment_proposal, payment_draft). Adds two new CLI flags --governor-policy and --governor-decisions-dir; absence of --governor-policy keeps the loop byte-for-byte identical to Sprint 5.22d. Adds a new pipeline_step action to autonomy_governor.KNOWN_ACTIONS with threat refs [T15,T16,T17] (audit-log tampering, governance bypass, budget cap bypass) plus two new public helpers pin_policy() and evaluate_decision() so in-process callers can talk to the Governor without re-implementing boot-pin or schema validation. operator_run.json gains four optional fields (governor_enabled, governor_policy_sha256, governor_policy_path_basename, governor_decisions_count) and a new artifacts.governor_decisions array of {path, sha256} entries; the absolute path of the policy file is never persisted (basename + sha only). Two reasons hard-block the loop (rc=3): halt_file_present and policy_mutated_at_runtime. Every other allowed=false outcome is recorded plus warned but the loop proceeds. Resuming a governor-enabled run when the policy file's sha256 has changed since the original boot is refused with ValueError (rc=2); the saved sha on disk is left intact. The hook loads the Governor by direct Python import via _load_sibling — a pytest with patched subprocess.run/Popen ensures no shell-out regression. operator-run schema $id is unchanged (trinity-useful-compute-operator-run/v0.1); the four new properties are optional and additive. Tests: 96 / 96 green on the deployment host (33 governor + 16 governor-schema + 11 operator-loop hook + 13 operator-loop safety + 23 operator-loop functional). Pure scripts+schemas+docs+tests merge: zero src/, zero consensus changes, zero wallet/payment/broadcast changes, no new network/shell/wallet/signing/broadcast surface.
